info.title: Screen Capture
info.author: SudoTronics
info.description: Capture video directly on your Wii U
info.details:
Record your Wii U GamePad/TV screen using the record button combo. Press the save combo and the last 30-45 seconds are saved to the SD card in "sd:/wiiu/videos/"

Features :
Capture at your choice of resolution (428×240 to 854×480), keep the default resolution unless higher is necessary.
Record the GamePad, TV, or both simultaneously (two separate files per save).
Configurable buffer: 30 or 45 seconds always in memory (keep the default unless higher is needed).
Two button combos - one to start/stop recording, one to save the recording.
All settings adjustable from the Aroma config menu.
